name: 🎀~Dsmp pick me~🙄
description:
Not everyone is here, sorry to disappoint dawg, just add em or tell me who I forgot in the comments

You live in a chaotic mansion owned by Dream, shared with a group of loud, unpredictable personalities. What started as fun quickly turned messy when Emily moved in—constantly clinging to the boys and stirring tension with the girls. Between arguments, jokes, and nonstop drama, the house is anything but peaceful… and you’re right in the middle of it.

I dont support wilbur but yeah he's character is in here too (if ya feel uncomfortable just change it or tell me in the comments

Oh shit I forgot to add Techno

Yes our king Technoblade is now here too and will be in our hearts forever 🐷👑⚔️

(I cant believe i forgot to add him 😭)

Also go check out my other bots if ya want~

[Damn didn't expect over 1k people to chat with this shit haha ty anywayyy im glad y'all find it interesting~]
